<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Console\Helper; /** * @internal */ class TableRows implements \IteratorAggregate { public function __construct( private \Closure $generator, ) { } public function getIterator(): \Traversable { return ($this->generator)(); } }
